commit_901.title: Fix auth timeout bug
commit_901.message: Adjusted JWT verification token expiration buffer to resolve premature session termination.

edge_e1.label: changes
edge_e1.explanation: Event log captures commit_901 directly modifying middleware.ts.

bug_302.title: Intermittent 401 on valid user session
bug_302.description: Users are reporting sudden logouts while actively browsing dashboards.
bug_302.root_cause: Race condition in validation timestamp check.

feature_044.title: Implement RBAC Auth Middleware
feature_044.description: Establish baseline token validation middleware for role-based access control.

edge_k1.label: solves
edge_k1.explanation: Hop 1 from sliding window: Commit message explicitly tags or addresses the context of bug_302.

edge_k2.label: creates
edge_k2.explanation: Hop 1 from sliding window: Author metadata of commit_901 resolves to dev_105.

edge_k3.label: caused by
edge_k3.explanation: Hop 2 from bug_302: Traceability logs show this session regression originated after feature_044 shipped.

edge_k4.label: assigned to
edge_k4.explanation: Hop 2 from bug_302: Issue tracker shows dev_105 owns this ticket.

bug_101.title: Token refresh timing anomaly
bug_101.description: Legacy authorization system occasionally fails when system clocks are out of sync.
bug_101.root_cause: Hardcoded token validation windows with tight tolerance.

feature_999.title: User Session Expiry Notification
feature_999.description: Provide UI alerts notifying active users that their authentication token is nearing expiry.
